ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the stock data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score associated with the stock for the day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the sentiment score */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Stock identifier */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score for the stock */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sentiment_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sentiment_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES stock_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_tier" TEXT /* Subscription tier of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, sentiment) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last triggered */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the report period */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the post is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the post was made (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the market trend */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector affected by the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., uptrend, downtrend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the prediction */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome based on the sentiment and market trends */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features included in the subscription plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the subscription */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "subscription_id")
)
